title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll conquer the Queen Elizabeth II Cup and
become a princess like Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one's a better fit for it than me! I won't let
Sweep steal my victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll claim the title of Queen! Grrraaahhh!
Princess☆Cross Chop!
